chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P.No.D-2592 of 2024 --------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE(S) OF JUDGE(S) ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1.For hearing of CMA No.12781/2024 2.For hearing of CMA No.12782/2024 3.For hearing of CMA No.11811/2024 4.For hearing of main case. 22.04.2025 Mr.Mujtaba Sohail Raja, Advocate for the Petitioner. Mr.Sandeep Malani, A.A.G. Mr.Khalid Mehmood Siddiqui, Advocate for Respondent No.3. Mr.Zaeem Hyder, Advocate for Intervener. On the last date, following order was passed:- “Learned A.A.G. points out that grievance of the petitioner is cancellation of mining right and the relevant cancellation order dated 25.01.2024 is already challenged in Suit, copy whereof is available at page 79 of the Court file. Learned counsel further states that the relief sought in the suit is being mirrored in this petition. Per learned A.A.G. the remedy was available to the petitioner under Rule 71 of Sindh Coal Mining Concession Rules, 2020, however, parallel / direct recourse to writ jurisdiction has been sought and the same is not maintainable. Upon so confronted, learned counsel for the petitioner seeks time to obtain instructions. Office is directed to de-tag this matter from this bunch and fix the same on 22.04.2025. Interim order if any, to continue till next date of hearing. “ Today, learned counsel for the petitioner is present and states that the petitioner will seek remedy before the concerned forum. In view hereof, the petition is dismissed as withdrawn, leaving the petitioner at liberty to avail remedy as available thereto under the law.
